source: Howard Gardner, Frames of Mind (1983) + Intelligence Reframed (1999). See SOURCES.md.

items.en: I enjoy and excel at writing, speaking, and learning foreign languages.
items.zh: 我喜欢并擅长写作、口语表达和外语学习。

items.ko: 단어·어휘·문장 표현에 민감하고 언어로 정밀하게 표현하는 것을 좋아한다.
items.en: I am sensitive to words, vocabulary, and sentence expression, and love precise verbal expression.
items.zh: 我对词汇与句子表达很敏感,喜欢用语言精准表达。

items.ko: 책·기사·시 같은 언어 콘텐츠를 깊이 감상하고 비평한다.
items.en: I deeply appreciate and critique books, articles, and poetry.
items.zh: 我深入欣赏并评论书籍、文章、诗歌等语言类内容。

items.en: I enjoy and excel at numbers, calculation, and statistics.
items.zh: 我喜欢并擅长数字、计算与统计。

items.ko: 논리 퍼즐·체스·수학 문제 같은 추론 게임을 즐긴다.
items.en: I enjoy reasoning games such as logic puzzles, chess, and math problems.
items.zh: 我喜欢逻辑谜题、国际象棋、数学题等推理游戏。

items.en: I quickly grasp complex systems and causal relationships.
items.zh: 我能够快速把握复杂的系统与因果关系。

items.en: I am good at drawing, design, and spatial visualization.
items.zh: 我擅长绘画、设计与空间视觉化。

items.ko: 지도를 읽고 방향감각이 뛰어나며 길을 잘 찾는다.
items.en: I read maps well, have a strong sense of direction, and navigate easily.
items.zh: 我看地图能力强,方向感好,容易找路。

items.ko: 머릿속에서 입체 회전·조작이 자연스럽고, 3D 공간을 잘 상상한다.
items.en: I naturally rotate and manipulate 3D objects in my mind and imagine 3D space well.
items.zh: 我能自然地在脑海中旋转、操作立体物体,擅长想象三维空间。

items.en: I am sensitive to melody, rhythm, and sound, and express them well.
items.zh: 我对旋律、节奏与声音很敏感,擅长音乐表达。

items.ko: 노래를 한 번 듣고 따라 부르거나 화음을 맞출 수 있다.
items.en: After hearing a song once, I can sing along or harmonize.
items.zh: 听过一遍歌就能跟唱或配和声。

items.en: I am drawn to playing instruments, composing, and analyzing music.
items.zh: 我被乐器演奏、作曲与音乐分析所吸引。

items.en: I enjoy physical activities, sports, dance, and acting.
items.zh: 我喜欢运动、舞蹈、表演等身体活动。

items.en: I quickly pick up new movements, athletic skills, and manual techniques.
items.zh: 我能快速学会新动作、运动技能与手工技巧。

items.ko: 손으로 직접 만들거나 고치는 일을 잘 하고 좋아한다.
items.en: I am good at and enjoy making or fixing things with my hands.
items.zh: 我擅长并喜欢用手制作或修理东西。

items.en: I quickly read other people's emotions, motives, and thoughts.
items.zh: 我能迅速读懂他人的情绪、动机与想法。

items.en: I naturally take on mediating and adjusting roles in conflicts.
items.zh: 在冲突中,我能自然地担任调解与协调的角色。

items.en: I come alive in group activities, teamwork, and leadership.
items.zh: 在团队活动、合作与领导中我感到充满活力。

items.ko: 내 감정·동기·가치를 깊이 알고 자기 분석을 즐긴다.
items.en: I deeply know my emotions, motives, and values, and enjoy self-analysis.
items.zh: 我深入了解自己的情绪、动机与价值观,喜欢自我分析。

items.ko: 자기 성찰·일기 쓰기·명상이 의미 있고 자연스럽다.
items.en: Self-reflection, journaling, and meditation feel meaningful and natural.
items.zh: 自省、写日记与冥想对我有意义且自然。

items.ko: 혼자 있는 시간이 회복적이고 자기 탐구의 기회가 된다.
items.en: Alone time is restorative and an opportunity for self-exploration.
items.zh: 独处时间让我恢复精力,是自我探索的机会。

items.en: I am deeply connected to and interested in nature, plants, animals, and the environment.
items.zh: 我与自然、动植物、环境有深刻的连接,且兴趣浓厚。

items.en: I classify and identify plant and animal species well.
items.zh: 我擅长分类与辨识植物与动物种类。

items.en: I feel most alive and restored in outdoor, natural environments.
items.zh: 在户外与自然环境中我最有活力,也最能恢复。

items.ko: "왜 사는가·죽음·우주의 의미" 같은 큰 질문을 자주 던진다.
items.en: I often pose big questions like 'Why do we live?', 'Death', 'The meaning of the universe.'
items.zh: 我经常思考"为何而活、死亡、宇宙的意义"等终极问题。

items.en: Exploring meaning, purpose, and transcendence comes naturally.
items.zh: 对意义、目的与超越的探索对我而言很自然。

items.en: I am deeply drawn to topics of religion, philosophy, spirituality, and mystery.
items.zh: 我对宗教、哲学、灵性与神秘的主题深感着迷。
